[2021-01-03 09:04] Ana: I invited Bogdan because he remembers every train platform.
[2021-01-03 09:12] Bogdan: Hello, I accept this responsibility with an unreasonable spreadsheet.
[2021-02-11 20:15] Ana: Carmen would know where the first shared playlist came from.
[2021-02-11 20:20] Carmen: The first playlist was definitely the lighthouse spreadsheet era.
[2021-02-13 22:10] Bogdan: The lighthouse spreadsheet sounds official now.
[2021-05-02 10:30] Carmen: I invited Daria for the picnic logistics.
[2021-05-02 10:35] Daria: I bring calendar discipline and snacks.
[2021-07-19 18:22] Ana: Florin should see this map idea before it becomes folklore.
[2021-07-19 18:25] Florin: A map of the chat is exactly my kind of strange useful thing.
[2021-08-03 21:00] Daria: The sandwich compass points north again.
[2021-08-03 21:03] Bogdan: Never argue with the sandwich compass.
[2021-08-04 09:42] Carmen: The sandwich compass got us through two missed buses.
[2022-01-14 12:18] Florin: Mihai has the screenshots from the first planning weekend.
[2022-01-14 12:24] Mihai: I found them, plus the original lighthouse spreadsheet note.
[2022-04-21 17:05] Ana: Spring topic: should the archive map show eras or people first?
[2022-04-21 17:10] Florin: People first, eras second, jokes threaded through both.
[2022-09-10 19:50] Daria: The sandwich compass has become a decision framework.
[2023-02-01 08:32] Bogdan: I propose the sarmale index for measuring gathering ambition.
[2023-02-01 08:45] Carmen: The sarmale index is absurdly accurate.
[2023-03-18 11:05] Mihai: According to the sarmale index, this is a serious weekend.
[2023-11-07 22:10] Ana: We have a whole era of lighthouse spreadsheet jokes now.
